research_question: After freezing VSUMD60 and CORR30 as reserve atomic keepers because neither graduated to a confirmatory mainline, which one of three higher-invested-weight oriented head-extraction Alpha158 reserve cards imxd5, cord30, and imax20 can beat the frozen v18 working reference on the trainval-only snapshot under a predeclared validation window and a single fixed boolean promotion rule?

time_partition_plan.note: The fixed test window 2022-01 to 2025-12 remains excluded by construction through the trainval-only snapshot.

confirmatory_shortlist_rationale.selection_source: restricted to Alpha158 exact standalone-positive reserve cards with higher deployed-capital potential than the VSUMD60 and CORR30 reserve keepers
selection_logic: Prefer head-extraction style reserve cards whose prior evidence suggested higher avg_invested_weight potential.
Prefer candidates that change the problem toward stronger capital deployment rather than further polishing low-exposure winners.
Keep shortlist width capped at three to preserve confirmatory budget discipline.
confirmatory_shortlist_rationale.excluded_candidates_note: VSUMD60 and CORR30 are intentionally excluded because both have already been frozen to reserve after completing their confirmatory lines.

reference_contract.score_family_rule: Use the frozen v18 working reference operational contract unchanged as the comparator for this shortlist round.
reference_contract.note: The reference is executed only as a frozen comparator and is not part of the confirmatory shortlist count.

decision_rule.boolean_expression: (validation_annual_relative_return - reference_validation_annual_relative_return > 0.005) AND (validation_relative_ir - reference_validation_relative_ir > 0.05) AND (validation_max_drawdown - reference_validation_max_drawdown >= -0.05) AND (validation_avg_turnover_daily - reference_validation_avg_turnover_daily <= 0.04) AND (validation_avg_invested_weight >= 0.18)
decision_rule.pass_interpretation: A candidate passes only if it beats the frozen v18 reference on return and IR, does not materially worsen drawdown, keeps turnover within a wider but still bounded tolerance, and reaches a higher minimum invested-weight floor.

frozen_dimensions.score_family_cardinality: single signal only for shortlisted candidates

disallowed_changes: Do not access or regenerate any snapshot that contains the 2022-2025 frozen test window.
Do not change the shortlist membership after registration.
Do not change candidate raw fields, ranking directions, or candidate names after registration.
Do not add overlays, family blends, or multi-signal combinations inside this round.
Do not change TopK width, benchmark, execution semantics, or cost semantics.
Do not change the validation window or the boolean promotion rule after registration.
notes: This round explicitly changes the question toward higher deployed-capital head-extraction candidates.
The turnover tolerance is widened from 0.02 to 0.04 only because this round no longer optimizes for low-exposure winners; the higher invested-weight floor is raised to 0.18 at the same time.
VSUMD60 and CORR30 remain reserve atomic keepers and are not reopened inside this round.
